name: Almond Peach Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and mayo in a bowl, then add the diced chicken. Mix thoroughly.
2. Add the halved green grapes to the mixture, being careful not to smash them.
3. Stir in the toasted almonds, salt, and white pepper.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Best served on a croissant.
